entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`planetKey` TEXT NOT NULL, `source` TEXT NOT NULL, `bookmarkedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `snapshotJson` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`planetKey`))

indices.name: index_bookmarks_source
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_bookmarks_source` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`source`)
